title: glass stuff
description: A mod that adds glass stuff to the game
body:
Elevate your building game with Glass Stuff, a simple yet stylish mod that introduces a range of sleek glass construction elements to Minecraft. Whether you want to add modern aesthetics to your home or create a visually stunning base, this mod has you covered!

Features:
Glass Door: A transparent, modern door option that lets you see the outside while keeping mobs out. Perfect for minimalistic builds!
Glass Trap Door: Need a stylish skylight or hidden entrance? The glass trap door seamlessly blends into any design.
Glass Stairs: Create smooth, transparent staircases for a futuristic or chic vibe.
These new blocks are crafted using regular glass and work just like their wooden or iron counterparts. Now you can finally build with glass without sacrificing function or style!
Get creative with Glass Stuff and transform your world with the beauty of transparency.
